news.headline: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says
news.summary: IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made directly by the company, a source told CNBC.

news.headline: Will Elon Musk eventually merge SpaceX with Tesla? Speculation is building
news.summary: Analysts speculate that Elon Musk will merge his two companies but traders on prediction markets are not so certain.

news.headline: Traders think this legacy tech stock is the ultimate quantum play
news.summary: Options traders stormed into the stock, trading almost 200,000 contracts, on pace for 15 times the daily average of the past 30 days.

news.headline: SpaceX, OpenAI valuations would mean they leapfrog Berkshire Hathaway on first day of trading
news.summary: Traders on prediction market Polymarket think SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic on their first day of trading will surpass valuations of at least $1.4 trillion.

news.headline: Oura, smart ring maker, confidentially files for IPO
news.summary: Oura, the maker of the health and wellness tracking smart ring, has confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC.

news.headline: How Walmart's gas price warning shapes our retail outlook — plus, Honeywell's quantum connection
news.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

news.headline: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
news.summary: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.

news.headline: LIV Golf seeks to raise up to $350 million from investors as post-PIF reality sets in
news.summary: LIV Golf is preparing to take its updated business plan and investor pitch on the road as soon as Thursday, in an effort to raise fresh capital.

news.headline: Retail investors will get access to SpaceX's IPO—here's what to know before buying
news.summary: Elon Musk's rocket and sattelite firm will make IPO shares available on platforms such as Fidelity, Robinhood and Charles Schwab.

news.headline: SpaceX insiders will get to sell shares earlier than usual after the IPO
news.summary: SpaceX is taking an unusual approach that could allow pre-IPO investors to sell sooner.

news.headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
news.summary: Nvidia blew away the numbers again.

news.headline: Oil markets could enter ‘red zone’ by July as stocks dwindle ahead of summer travel season, IEA chief says
news.summary: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol said the single most important solution to the Iran war energy shock is a full and unconditional reopening of the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz.

news.headline: Billionaire families bet on semiconductor and energy stocks in first quarter during Iran war
news.summary: Private investment firms of David Tepper and other billionaires doubled down on chipmakers despite the Iran war pressuring data center economics.

news.headline: Traders are making big moves ahead of these earnings reports due Thursday
news.summary: With Nvidia earnings in the rearview mirror, traders have a handful of earnings before and after the bell to trade on Thursday.
